---
name: portable-with-assets
description: Use a packaged asset while remaining portable across adapter roots.
---

# Portable With Assets

Use `assets/template.md` as a copied local template.

## Resource map

- COPY `assets/template.md` when creating the portable fixture output.
  Fill: title and body.
  Do not emit unfilled placeholders.

## Expected output

- A reviewable artifact copied from the packaged asset.
